name: Mahogany Chicken Wings with Green Papaya Salad
recipeIngredient: Unripe Green Papaya, Grated or Julienne Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine hoisin sauce, plum sauce, soy sauce, cider vinegar, sherry, honey, green onions, and garlic. Mix well.
2. Add chicken drumettes to the marinade and cover. Refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
3. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Arrange marinated chicken drumettes on a baking pan and roast, basting frequently, until the marinade thickens and the chicken is a mahogany color, about 30 to 40 minutes.
4. Place Green Papaya Salad on a large platter and arrange Mahogany Chicken Wings over top. Garnish with Thai basil.
